user.title: Select lights
user.description: Choose which lights will be included in the entertainment area.

pre_pairing.title: Ready to pair
pre_pairing.description:
The next step will start a 60-second pairing window.

Before pressing **Next**, open your TV's settings and navigate to **Ambilight > Ambilight+hue** so it's ready to search for the bridge.

pairing.title: Pairing in progress
pairing.description: Searching for your TV. The pairing window is open for 60 seconds.

not_paired.title: Pairing timed out
not_paired.description: Your TV did not pair within 60 seconds. The bridge will start without a paired TV — you can pair later from the integration's Configure menu.

progress.waiting_for_tv: Waiting for your TV to pair…

abort.already_configured: Hue Entertainment Bridge is already configured.

init.title: Hue Entertainment Bridge
init.description: Update the entertainment area lights or pair your TV.

data_description.pair_now: Opens a 60-second pairing window after saving.

pairing.title: Pair your TV
pairing.description: Open Ambilight Sync settings on your TV now. The pairing window is open for 60 seconds.

not_paired.title: Pairing timed out
not_paired.description: Your TV did not pair within 60 seconds. You can try again from Configure.

progress.waiting_for_tv: Waiting for your TV to pair…
